title: India's cenbank cuts growth outlook, raises inflation forecast as it keeps rates steady at 5.25%
summary_full: RBI raised its inflation projection for the year ending March 2027 by 50 basis points to 5.1%, while cutting growth forecast to 6.6% for the year, from 6.9%.
summary_public: RBI raised its inflation projection for the year ending March 2027 by 50 basis points to 5.1%, while cutting growth forecast to 6.6% for the year, from 6.9%.
